equipBonuses.name: Impending Doom set bonus
equipBonuses.description: Set Impending Doom (0/2) — Charges by daily/encounter/in-combat. Unleashed: Tank −1% Incoming dmg, Heal −1% OH; +x% Forte; +x% Defense

equipBonuses.name: Impending Doom (2/2)
equipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power, 1 charge per 9s in combat. Unleashed grants: DPS +5% Base Damage Boost, Heal +3% Outgoing Healing. Charges and Unleashed last 15s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

equipBonuses.name: Impending Doom (2/2)
equipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power, 1 charge per 9s in combat. Unleashed grants: DPS +5% Base Damage Boost, Heal +3% Outgoing Healing. Charges and Unleashed last 15s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Rage (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased by 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.

equipBonuses.name: Resourceful Forte (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave maximum increases by 20%. Gain 3.5% Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Rage (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.

equipBonuses.name: Tactical Daily (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). You gain 5% Combat Advantage.

equipBonuses.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 5s.

2 of Set: +1% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4+ opponents, lose a stack. Based on your role, each stack of Darklight grants: DPS +0.6% Base Damage Boost, Tank -0.6% Incoming Damage, Healer +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Max 10 stacks. Stack bonuses doubled in Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Resilience
equipBonuses.description: Gain up to -2% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Brutality
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, you gain a stack of Reckless Brutality, increasing your Power by 2000 but increasing your damage taken by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Brutality
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Brutality, increasing your Power by 2000 but increasing your damage taken by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to -9% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: -0% Incoming Damage. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to -20% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down.

copies.notes: Legacy Warlock gear collection screenshot intake 2026-05-13.

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to -70% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down.

equipBonuses.name: Party aura (stacks with allies using similar set)

equipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. DPS +2% Base Damage Boost, Tank -2% Incoming Damage, Healer +2% Overall Outgoing Healing. May stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of beholder slayer weapons. When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.

copies.notes: Legacy Warlock gear collection screenshot intake 2026-05-13.

equipBonuses.name: Role boost on Combat Advantage hit

equipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: 2% Base Damage Boost, -2% Incoming Damage, or 2% Overall Outgoing Healing depending on role, while in the Underdark. Gain 7.5% Base Damage Boost, -7.5% Incoming Damage, or 7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing on your role, for 15 seconds when you dodge, block, sprint or shadow slip (30 second cooldown). When dealing combat advantage damage, you have a 10% chance to gain 3% Base Damage Boost, -3% Incoming Damage, or 3% Overall Outgoing Healing for 15s (30s cooldown).

copies.notes: Legacy Warlock gear collection screenshot intake 2026-05-13.

equipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, -3% Incoming Damage. May stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of Duergar weapons.

copies.notes: Legacy Warlock gear collection screenshot intake 2026-05-13.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Strike
equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Accuracy is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Recharge Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Strike
equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Strike is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, your Accuracy is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Recharge Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.name: Herald's Cunning
equipBonuses.description: When you have no teammates within 30' of you, your Stamina Regeneration and Control Resistance is increased by 5%.

copies.source: Dragonbone Vale Campaign Store (Scalebreaker's Gear, Set 2 of 11)

equipBonuses.name: Herald's Cunning
equipBonuses.description: When you have teammates within 10' of you, your Stamina Regeneration and Control Resistance is increased by 5%.
